objective: Engineers trust their CI pipeline and get fast, reliable feedback on every code push
strategic_priority: Eliminate the #1 developer pain point (CI friction) to recover engineering productivity and restore trust in the build-test-merge feedback loop

key_results.description: Backend and frontend engineers experience CI builds that complete fast enough to maintain flow state, measured by median CI build time dropping from 45 minutes to under 15 minutes
Engineers stop re-running CI as a workaround for flaky tests, measured by CI re-run rate dropping from approximately 50% to below 10%
Engineers rely on the remote build cache instead of abandoning it, measured by Bazel remote cache hit rate increasing from approximately 30% to at least 80% for unchanged targets
key_results.unit: percent (cache hit rate for unchanged targets)
